name_en: 🔥New Arrival 🆕Medium Reindeer Leather Flamenco Purse Handbag 👜Celebrity Style Flamenco Purse features a pleated design with iconic side knot. This medium version is made of reindeer leather 🥰. *Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable adjustable leather strap *Removable donut ⛓ chain with 💚Anagram Pebble *🧸Ultra-light, ultra-soft, and scratch-resistant. Comes with two straps, suitable for single shoulder or crossbody. Magnetic closure *Suede lining * LOE💎WE Silver Plating 🎁
name_cn:
